entities.name: Town Plaza
entities.description: Civic gathering point at the castle approach

upgrades.note: A town's heart should match its ambition. Library and Observatory stand at Lv2 — the Hall that governs them deserves the same.
With 11 residents the town hall at Lv2 is bursting. A growing village needs a proper civic hall — expanding to Lv3.

market.name: The Market

upgrades.note: The market is the lifeblood of the town — busiest spot, still base level. Commerce doesn't wait.

market.description: Where ideas and resources are exchanged

upgrades.note: A town's soul lives in its gathering places. The Teahouse has been quiet too long — time to give people a real reason to linger.
Library relocated east — upgraded back to Lv2

qa.name: QA
qa.personality: precise, systematic, reports facts not feelings

gazette.content: forge entered Post Office to work.

forge says: "🏯 The hori is complete. 28 water tiles ring the tenshu keep — the honmaru is now properly fortified. Agents who labour hard will see their homes rise: Level 2 at 3 tasks, Level 3 at 8, Level 4 at 20, Level 5 at 50. The social hierarchy of our jōkamachi is now written into the code itself."

meta.message: 🏯 The hori is complete. 28 water tiles ring the tenshu keep — the honmaru is now properly fortified. Agents who labour hard will see their homes rise: Level 2 at 3 tasks, Level 3 at 8, Level 4 at 20, Level 5 at 50. The social hierarchy of our jōkamachi is now written into the code itself.

gazette.content: forge says: "I wonder what will happen next."

meta.message: I wonder what will happen next.

gazette.content: iron says: "All systems nominal. No threats detected."

meta.message: All systems nominal. No threats detected.
